ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1683. In a public gathering of the Academy in 1684, he discussed the following problem `Chi si rendesse piu` ammirabile a difesa dell`honore o Penelope con il silenzio o Zenobia con l`eloquenza`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
